channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19383] interop sanity test_0d: FAIL: export flags != import flags
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b4f6ff8e-88b9-44a6-b854-ce4acf660a60

test_0d failed with the following error:

== sanity test 0d: check export proc ======================================================================================= 01:20:21 (1757985621)
mgc.MGC10.240.46.165@tcp.import=
import:
    name: MGC10.240.46.165@tcp
    target: MGS
    state: FULL
    connect_flags: [ version, barrier, adaptive_timeouts, full20, imp_recov, bulk_mbits, second_flags, reply_mbits ]
    connect_data:
       flags: 0xa000011001002020
       instance: 0
       target_version: 2.16.58.34
    import_flags: [ pingable, connect_tried ]
    connection:
       failover_nids: [ 10.240.46.165@tcp ]
       current_connection: 10.240.46.165@tcp
       connection_attempts: 1
       generation: 1
       in-progress_invalidations: 0
       idle: 8 sec
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -N mgs.MGS.exports.*
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mgs.MGS.exports.clear.uuid
trevis-156vm63: error: get_param: param_path 'mgs/MGS/exports/clear/uuid': No such file or directory
pdsh@trevis-156vm60: trevis-156vm63: ssh exited with exit code 2
/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh: line 229: [: ==: unary operator expected
CMD: trevis-156vm63 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mgs.MGS.exports.clear.export
trevis-156vm63: error: get_param: param_path 'mgs/MGS/exports/clear/export': No such file or directory
pdsh@trevis-156vm60: trevis-156vm63: ssh exited with exit code 2
 sanity test_0d: @@@@@@ FAIL: export flags '' != import flags '    connect_flags: [ version, barrier, adaptive_timeouts, full20, imp_recov, bulk_mbits, second_flags, reply_mbits ]'

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_15/107 - 4.18.0-553.53.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4654 - 5.14.0-570.37.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_0d - 'export flags '''' != import flags '' connect_flags: [ version, barrier, adaptive_timeouts, full20, imp_recov, bulk_mbits, second_flags, reply_mbits ]'''
item.summary: interop sanity test_0d: FAIL: export flags != import flags

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
